home.title: NosaraDayCamp
home.description: Safe adventures, nature and unforgettable activities for kids in Nosara. Exploration, horseback riding, team games and a crew that cares about every detail.

about.title: About us
about.p1: Our camp is designed to give children a fun, educational and safe experience in nature with plenty of outdoor adventures. We offer around 30 different activities, each unique and built so kids enjoy themselves while they learn.
about.p2: Beyond fun, we run an educational program focused on natural resources and caring for the environment. Our camp combines recreation, learning and connection with nature. More than just entertaining kids, we want them to have meaningful experiences that help them value the environment, animals and natural resources in our community.
about.p3: Through outings, special classes and recreational activities, we promote respect for nature, living together, teamwork and personal safety.

map.title: Activities
map.lead: More than 30 experiences across six routes. The map moves gently as you scroll.

team.title: Team Nosara Day Camp
team.lead: Trusted people who go with the kids on every outing, with clear standards for safety and human warmth.
team.intro: We operate with <1>1 counselor for every 4 children</1>, so no one is left without close supervision. The entire field team is <2>certified in first aid</2> and brings <3>years of experience</3> working with children, outings and outdoor activities in Nosara. Administration is led by <4>Cinthya Rosales</4>. Guides and counselors <5>Laura Rosales, Emily Rosales, Wilberth Serrano and Ines Rosales</5> know the area, support with patience and apply the camp’s safety protocols.
team.hRatioDesc: One counselor for every four children
team.hExpDesc: Years caring for children at camp and in nature

contact.title: Message us — we will get back to you soon
contact.subtitle: Tell us the children’s ages, the dates you are interested in and any questions about schedules or activities. We are happy to help you choose the best Nosara Day Camp experience.
